properties.description: Detects unusual file access or modification events by monitoring syslog messages for keywords such as 'modified', 'changed', 'deleted', or 'created' in relation to sensitive files or directories (e.g., /etc/passwd, /etc/shadow, /etc/sudoers, /etc/group, /var/log), which may signal potential indicator removal or tampering.
properties.query:
Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Message|contains has "/etc/passwd" or Message|contains has "/etc/shadow" or Message|contains has "/etc/sudoers" or Message|contains has "/etc/group" or Message|contains has "/var/log") and (Message|contains has "modified" or Message|contains has "changed" or Message|contains has "deleted" or Message|contains has "created")
